title: festuca numidica
intro: Festuca numidica is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of fescue grass. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Festuca numidica include alleviating congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. Festuca numidica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water.
